result.reason: Implement a new global setting to disable and hide all MultiSSH-related UI elements (toolbar, context menu items) for users who do not need the feature, reducing UI clutter.
result.approach: Add a new boolean setting, e.g., 'General.DisableMultiSSH', to control the visibility of all MultiSSH features. Modify `frmMain.cs` to hide the `MultiSshToolStrip` if this setting is true. Update `ConnectionWindow.cs` to hide 'Include/Exclude in Multi SSH' context menu items based on this setting. Add a checkbox in `GeneralPage.cs` to allow users to toggle this setting.
